name: autouniverse
description: Auto Universe — PWA ekosistem za auto industriju (Garage + Driver Toolbox). Capacitor za Android APK, isti vanilla JS kod za PWA i native.

scripts.cap:sync:garage: npm run build:garage && cd platforms/garage && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:driver: npm run build:driver && cd platforms/driver && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:open:garage: cd platforms/garage && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:open:driver: cd platforms/driver && npx cap open android

author: Milan Plocic (Belora Ventures Studio)
